description_long: This object is a compact, wireless earbud with a smooth, white plastic exterior and a streamlined, ergonomic shape designed to fit comfortably in the ear. The main body is cylindrical, tapering into a rounded head with a visible mesh speaker grille and several small sensor or microphone openings. The lower portion features a metallic contact at the base, likely for charging, and subtle seams indicating assembly. The surface is glossy and reflective, with minimal visible markings or branding. Its design is minimalist, with all functional elements integrated seamlessly into the form. The object is lightweight and small, suitable for portable, personal use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, white wireless earbud with a glossy finish, mesh speaker grille, and integrated sensors. Compact and ergonomically shaped for in-ear use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved stem, speaker grille, and a small sensor opening near the top.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the mesh speaker grille, two sensor/microphone ports, and the rounded head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unbroken surface and the ergonomic curve of the earbud.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a small port and the continuous, glossy surface of the stem.
